title: SDK: Make monday.execute("openItemCard", ...) available on mobile
excerpt: It would be really great to be able to use “openItemCard” on mobile/tablet, instead of having to create a custom modal for mobile.

posts.author: gdacier (Guillaume Dacier)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really great to be able to use “openItemCard” on mobile/tablet, instead of having to create a custom modal for mobile.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @gdacier !

I have added this as a feature request for our team

Thank you for the feedback!

Cheers,
Matias
